creator: des@ofug.org
text:
"Kenneth D. Merry" <ken@kdm.org> writes:
> That's good to know.  What firmware revision is it?  (dmesg output would
> do the trick)  And what controller is it on?

Sorry for the delay. Here's a dmesg:
